user_query: Change childs third day, second breakfast option to spagetti with maple syrup

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Child > Day 3 > Breakfast > Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo

meal_suggestion.from: Toast the bread, mash avocado and spread on top, add a cooked egg, and finish with a squeeze of lemon and a dash of pepper. Optional flavor tweaks include adding garlic, ginger, or chili flakes if you like.
meal_suggestion.to: Cook spaghetti until al dente according to package instructions. Drain, reserving a little cooking water. Return spaghetti to the pot, add a small pat of butter or a drizzle of olive oil, and toss to coat. Drizzle pure maple syrup over the warm pasta and toss gently to combine; add a splash of reserved pasta water if needed to loosen. Serve warm. Optional: sprinkle with a pinch of cinnamon and some toasted chopped walnuts for texture, or serve alongside a protein such as Greek yogurt or a boiled egg.

nutrition_note.from: Well-balanced morning option with fiber from whole-grain bread, heart-healthy fats from avocado, and protein from egg. Lemon adds vitamin C; this combo provides steady energy and satiety. Note: garlic/ginger are not included in the listed ingredients.
nutrition_note.to: This is a high-carbohydrate, sweet breakfast. Maple syrup provides quick sugars; pairing with a protein (Greek yogurt, nuts, or an egg) helps balance blood sugar and adds satiety. Use a modest drizzle of syrup and add nuts or a protein source to improve nutritional balance.

short_description.from: Avocado toast on whole-grain bread topped with egg and a lemon finish.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the Avocado Toast meal into a new meal 'Spaghetti with Maple Syrup' per the user's request. All meal fields rewritten to reflect the new dish and its nutrition.
